title_en: How high can Red Bull fly?
rubric_en: The world’s most formidable marketing machine faces growing threats
rubric_zh: 世界上最强大的营销机器正面临日益增多的威胁

paragraphs.en: CAn Red Bull give die Mannschaft wiiings? After Germany was bundled out of the World Cup on June 29th the national football federation turned to Jürgen Klopp to take charge of the team. The celebrated coach—who has agreed in principle to take the job—is currently the Austrian company’s “global head of soccer”, overseeing eight clubs around the world.
paragraphs.zh: 红牛能给“德意志国家队”长出翅膀吗？在德国队于6月29日出局于世界杯之后，德国足球联合会转而请约翰内斯·克洛普接任球队主教练。这位备受赞誉的教练已原则性同意接掌大权，目前担任奥地利红牛公司的“足球全球负责人”，负责管理其在世界范围内的八家俱乐部。

paragraphs.en: Over the decades the world’s leading maker of energy drinks has come to play an outsize role in all manner of sports, from football to Formula One. It is a marketing strategy that Dietrich Mateschitz, Red Bull’s founder, pursued with gusto. Mateschitz adapted his drink in the 1980s from Krating Daeng, a Thai energy tonic. (The Yoovidhya family, its creator’s heirs, own 51% of Red Bull.) The Austrian proved to have a rare talent for marketing. “Red Bull verleiht Flüüügel” (”Red Bull gives you wiiings”) was his idea. So was sponsoring Felix Baumgartner, an Austrian skydiver who in 2012 jumped to Earth from a helium balloon in the stratosphere.
paragraphs.zh: 数十年来，世界最大的能量饮料制造商已在多种体育项目中发挥了巨大影响，从足球到一级方程式赛车皆如此。这是其创始人迪特里希·马特施奇茨推动的一项炽热营销战略。马特施奇茨在20世纪80年代将红牛改良自泰国能量补剂克拉廷达英（Krating Daeng）。（它的创始家族优维德亚（Yoovidhya）仍持有红牛51%的股权。）这位奥地利人展现出罕见的营销天赋。“Red Bull verleiht Flüüügel”（“红牛给你翅膀”）就是他的主意。赞助奥地利跳伞员菲利克斯·鲍姆加特纳并组织其2012年从氦气气球中跳入平流层再返回地球，也是出于同样的思路。

paragraphs.en: When Mateschitz died in 2022, some thought Red Bull would fall as quickly as it had risen. He had no clear successor: a three-man board, all of whom keep a low profile, took over management. (Mateschitz’s son Mark inherited his 49% stake, but has no operative role.)
paragraphs.zh: 马特施奇茨于2022年去世后，不少人认为红牛会像它崛起一样迅速失势。他没有明确指定继承人；一个三人管理小组接管了运营，该小组成员都保持低调。 （马特施奇茨的儿子马克继承了他49%的股份，但并不参与经营。）

paragraphs.en: Yet Red Bull has continued to fly. Last year it sold 14bn cans, up by 10% from 2024. It has 28% of the global market, well ahead of Monster, its main rival, with 17%. It has stayed aloft mainly by sticking to Mateschitz’s strategy. Even so, threats from regulators and new competitors loom.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，红牛依然在高空飞行。去年其销量达到140亿罐，同比增长10%，高于2024年水平。其全球市场份额为28%，远超主要竞争对手怪兽（Monster）的17%。红牛之所以能维持领先，主要是因为坚持了马特施奇茨的策略。尽管如此，监管者和新竞争对手带来的威胁正悄然逼近。

paragraphs.en: The triumvirate that now runs Red Bull has kept to the pricier end of the market. A standard 250ml can costs around $2.40 at Walmart, America’s biggest supermarket. The company still outsources manufacturing to long-term business partners: Rauch Fruchtsäfte, another Austrian firm, mixes and cans the drinks; America’s Ball Corporation supplies the aluminium cans. This has helped Red Bull stay debt-free.
paragraphs.zh: 如今管理红牛的三位人物仍将定位放在较高价位。标准的250毫升罐装饮品在美国最大连锁超市沃尔玛售价约为2.40美元。公司仍将制造环节外包给长期合作伙伴：另一家奥地利公司Rauch Fruchtsäfte负责调配与罐装，而美国Ball Corporation提供铝罐。这一模式帮助红牛保持了无负债状态。

paragraphs.en: Red Bull continues to spend around 30% of sales on marketing—more than €3bn ($3.4bn) last year. Coca-Cola, the world leader in soft drinks, spends around 10% and Monster 7.5%. It eschews conventional advertising, instead making its own content through Red Bull Media House, Austria’s biggest media company after ORF, the state broadcaster. It encompasses a TV network, film and TV studios, a record label and several magazines.
paragraphs.zh: 红牛每年仍将约30%的销售额用于市场营销，去年的支出超过30亿欧元（34亿美元）。而世界软饮料龙头可口可乐的这一比例约为10%，怪兽仅为7.5%。它不采用传统广告，而是依靠红牛媒体集团（Red Bull Media House）制作自己的内容。该集团是奥地利仅次于国家广播公司ORF的第二大媒体企业，旗下包括电视网络、影视制作室、唱片公司以及数本杂志。

paragraphs.en: Not everybody is a fan. Some criticise its sponsorship of extreme sports. Almost two dozen athletes have died while performing its stunts. Last year the European Commission began investigating whether Red Bull had broken EU competition rules by using its dominant position to press retailers to stop selling rivals’ wares or to place them unfavourably.
paragraphs.zh: 并非所有人都认可红牛。有人批评其极限运动赞助。几乎有两个多打运动员在其表演的特技中丧生。去年，欧盟委员会开始调查红牛是否违反欧盟竞争规则，是否利用其市场主导地位要求零售商停止销售竞争对手产品，或将其商品放在不利位置。

paragraphs.en: Another line of criticism concerns the side-effects of its signature product, which contains caffeine, taurine and sugar. The company says that “health authorities around the world have concluded that Red Bull is safe to consume,” and points out that a 250ml can contains the same amount of caffeine as a cup of home-brewed coffee. But studies show that, even in moderate amounts, it is harmful for children, as it increases heart rate and blood pressure. The American Academy of Paediatrics and the Food and Drug Administration recommend that children should avoid energy drinks. Latvia, Lithuania and Poland are among the countries that ban their sale to under-18s. Britain is mulling doing so for under-16s. For its part, Red Bull notes that energy drinks “are not recommended for children”, and that it does not market its products to them.
paragraphs.zh: 另一类争议指向其招牌产品的副作用。该饮品含有咖啡因、牛磺酸和糖。公司表示“世界各国卫生机构已认定红牛安全可饮”，并指出一罐250毫升含有与一杯自制咖啡相当的咖啡因含量。但研究显示，即便适量饮用，对儿童也有害，因为它会提高心率和血压。美国儿科学会（American Academy of Paediatrics）和美国食品药品监督管理局（FDA）都建议儿童避免饮用能量饮料。拉脱维亚、立陶宛和波兰已将其列为禁止向18岁以下销售的国家之一。英国正在研究是否对16岁以下人群实行同类限制。红牛方面则表示，能量饮料“不建议儿童饮用”，且公司并不向儿童做产品营销。

paragraphs.en: New competitors are eager to position themselves as a healthier alternative. Celsius, an American brand, contains no added sugar and far fewer calories than Red Bull (but more than twice the caffeine). Known to some as “Red Bull for women”, it has become the number three energy drink in America, after Red Bull and Monster.
paragraphs.zh: 新竞争者正积极把自己定位为更健康的替代品。美国品牌Celsius不添加糖，热量远低于红牛（但咖啡因含量却是红牛的两倍以上）。该品牌被一些人称作“女性版红牛”，目前已成为美国第三大能量饮料品牌，仅次于红牛和怪兽。

paragraphs.en: For now, Red Bull remains on top. When Mateschitz originally adapted Krating Daeng to European palates, experts told him that no one would want it. He ignored them, charged a premium price for the concoction and built a market for it based largely on its adventurous image. You might call it gravity-defying. ■
paragraphs.zh: 目前红牛仍居榜首。马特施奇茨最初将克拉廷达英改良为符合欧洲人口味时，专家曾对他说没有人会买账。他无视这些意见，给这款配方定了高价，并几乎完全凭借其冒险形象创建了市场。你可以把它称为“逆重力”。

paragraphs.en: To track the trends shaping commerce, industry and technology, sign up to “The Bottom Line”, our weekly subscriber-only newsletter on global business.
paragraphs.zh: 想跟踪正在塑造商业、产业和技术的趋势，请订阅我们每周仅面向订阅者的《The Bottom Line》通讯。
